category_sources: source_facts.description says minimal CGI and FastCGI library for C/C++; official kcgi homepage describes it as an open-source CGI and FastCGI library for C/C++ web applications.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kcgi; official homepage title is kcgi - minimal CGI and FastCGI library for C/C++.
docs_sources: Official kcgi homepage says the manpages starting with kcgi(3) are canonical documentation and also provides deployment and usage guides.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official kcgi homepage links to the GitHub repository and states bleeding-edge code is on GitHub.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies C/C++ CGI and FastCGI library; official homepage describes minimal, secure, auditable web application support and canonical manpages.
